news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: Solana生态总锁仓量（TVL）本周上涨12%，主要受新去中心化交易所（DEX）交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana’s total value locked (TVL) rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将支持更强智能合约表达能力和更低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026. The upgrade promises enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower transaction fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism。
news.summary_en: Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP) has added support for Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议ZK-Rollup Layer2方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Solution
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2扩容方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group has released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing fees for small transactions.
